title: codereview: identity.py missing yggdrasil derivation matching Rust and spec 8.6
close_reason: Fixed yggdrasil_address in identity.py to match Rust yggdrasil_addr_from_pubkey exactly (IID in lower 64 bits, correct SHA-512 prefix construction per spec/06-security.md:152 and test vectors). Updated docstring. Tests and vectors now consistent. Commit e463f6c9c
